MODULE: cosmos.memory.recall_memory
FILE: cosmos/memory/recall_memory.py (516 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Recall Memory - Conversation History Search

Novel Approaches:
1. Temporal Chunking - Smart conversation segmentation
2. Topic Threading - Automatic conversation topic tracking
3. Sentiment Indexing - Emotion-aware retrieval
4. Speaker Attribution - Multi-party conversation support

CLASSES:
- ConversationTurn: A single turn in a conversation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'ConversationTurn'
- ConversationChunk: A chunk of related conversation turns.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- RecallResult: Result from recall search.
- RecallMemory: Conversation history with intelligent search.

Features:
- Automatic conversatio
  Methods: async def add_turn(self, role: str, content: str, metadata: Optional[dict]=None) -> ConversationTurn
  Methods: async def search(self, query: str, top_k: int=10, time_range: Optional[tuple[datetime, datetime]]=No
  Methods: def get_recent(self, count: int=10) -> list[ConversationTurn]
  Methods: def get_by_topic(self, topic: str, limit: int=20) -> list[ConversationTurn]
  Methods: def to_context_string(self, max_turns: int=10, max_length: int=3000) -> str
  Methods: async def load_session(self, session_id: str)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
